GpuProjectExec
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [ext_price@4 DESC, i_brand_id@5 ASC, t_hour@2 ASC]
    GpuSortExec
      GpuProjectExec
        GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[i_brand, i_brand_id, t_hour, t_minute], aggr=[sum(tmp.ext_price)]
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=16777216
            GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([i_brand@0, i_brand_id@1, t_hour@2, t_minute@3], 8), input_partitions=8

                  GpuHashJoinExec

--- memory ---
GpuProjectExec: row_width=60, subtree_max_row_bytes=128
  GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=128
    GpuSortExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=128
      GpuProjectExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=128
        GpuAggregateExec: row_width=60, subtree_max_row_bytes=128
          GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=60, subtree_max_row_bytes=128

                  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=60, subtree_max_row_bytes=128
